title: Linear Optical Gates: Beam Splitters, Phase Shifters, and the KLM Scheme
description: Learn how to implement quantum gates using linear optical elements and understand the revolutionary KLM scheme that enables universal quantum computing with photons.
learningObjectives: Understand beam splitter and phase shifter transformations
Implement single-qubit gates using waveplates and interferometers
Explain the challenge of two-qubit gates with non-interacting photons
Describe the KLM scheme for measurement-induced nonlinearity
Analyze the resource overhead of probabilistic photonic gates
